<!--
Thanks for contributing to Uptimizr! Fill in the sections below.
Keep PRs focused; see CONTRIBUTING.md for the full guidelines.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior or an event shape)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Chore / tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint typecheck build test` pass locally
- [ ] Docs updated where applicable — public docs site (`oss/apps/docs`) and the
      integration/API reference (`docs/integration.md`) for any new feature, option, event, or
      endpoint
- [ ] **Changeset added** (`pnpm changeset`) for any change to a publishable `@uptimizr/*` package
- [ ] **Playwright E2E** added/updated under `examples/playground/e2e/` for user-visible features
- [ ] New decisions captured as an ADR (`docs/adr`) where significant

## AI-assisted contribution

<!--
For transparency, if this PR was authored primarily by an AI agent — with little or no human
review of the generated code — please say so here (see CONTRIBUTING.md → AI-assisted contributions).
-->

- [ ] This PR was generated primarily by an AI agent
